result.summary: Analyzed sub_layer_0_05_rules: 131 rule files, comprehensive governance framework

overview.description: Universal rules that apply across all layers, stages, OS, and tool contexts

rootLevelFiles: context_priority_rules.md - Layer inheritance and override rules
FILE_PATH_LINKING_RULE.md - CRITICAL: Always include clickable paths

0_every_api_request.purpose: Rules for EVERY interaction (must be followed always)
rules: AI_CONTEXT_MODIFICATION_PROTOCOL.md - Show diagram, wait for approval before modifying
AI_CONTEXT_COMMIT_PUSH_RULE.md - Git add/commit/push after approved changes
CONTEXT_TRAVERSAL_RULE.md - Read CLAUDE.md files and gather context first

1_scenario_based.purpose: Rules for specific scenarios (reference when applicable)
rules: safety_governance.md - Security decisions, permissions, sensitive operations
LAYER_CONTEXT_HEADER_PROTOCOL.md - Creating new files with headers

corePrinciples: 1. Least Privilege - Operate with minimum permissions needed
2. Defense in Depth - Multiple layers of protection
3. Audit Everything - Log all actions for review
4. Human Oversight - Critical decisions require approval
5. Fail Secure - When in doubt, deny and escalate
criticalRules: AI Context Modification Protocol - MUST show diagram and get approval before changes
AI Context Commit/Push Rule - MUST commit and push after approved changes
Context Traversal Rule - MUST read CLAUDE.md files before starting work
File Path Linking Rule - MUST include clickable file paths

layerPermissions.layer_0: System Manager - Full filesystem access, can execute commands with approval gates
layerPermissions.layer_1: Project Manager - Project scope access, approval needed for dependencies
layerPermissions.layer_2+: Standard Agent - Feature scope access, more restricted

inheritance.model: Higher-numbered layers inherit from lower layers
inheritance.override: Higher-numbered layers CAN override lower layers with @override marker
inheritance.scope: Overrides only apply within their scope (no sibling inheritance)

ruleCategories.scenarioBased: 1_scenario_based/ - 9 rules applied when specific scenarios arise
